title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 472.075 - Clerk and certain personnel of probate division to be appointed by judge (St. Louis City)
text:
472.075.  Clerk and certain personnel of probate division to be appointed by judge (St. Louis City). — The clerk and other nonjudicial personnel of the probate division of circuit courts of any city not within a county shall be appointed by the judge of the probate division with the consent of the court en banc, unless otherwise provided by local court rule.
(L. 2004 S.B. 1211)
